bird.name: Social flycatcher
bird.summary: The social flycatcher (Myiozetetes similis) is a passerine bird from the Americas, a member of the large tyrant flycatcher family Tyrannida…

locations.name: 徐畢克斯
locations.summary: 约翰·巴普蒂斯特·冯·施皮克斯（德語：Johann Baptist von Spix，1781年2月9日—1826年3月13日）是日耳曼生物学家。他到巴西探險，帶回了大量植物、昆蟲、哺乳動物、鳥類、兩棲動物和魚類標本，成為今日慕尼黑邦立動…

locations.name: 美洲
locations.summary: 亚美利加洲（英語：Americas）簡稱美洲，位于西半球，自然地理分为北美洲和南美洲，其中北美洲可进一步划分为北美地区、中美洲（联合国地理方案将墨西哥视为中美洲的一部分）和加勒比地区（西印度群岛）三个地理区域。美洲的总面積達4254.9万…

locations.name: 帕拉州
locations.summary: 帕拉（葡萄牙語：Pará，巴西葡萄牙语發音：[pa.'ɾa]）是巴西北部的一个州，首府貝倫。与帕拉州相邻的巴西州份有阿马帕州、马拉尼昂州、托坎廷斯州、马托格罗索州、亚马孙州和罗赖马州。 该州与圭亚那、苏里南接壤。

locations.name: 帕拉伊巴州
locations.summary: 帕拉伊巴州（葡萄牙語：Paraíba，葡萄牙語發音：[paɾaˈibɐ]）是巴西东北部一州，濒临大西洋。帕拉伊巴州是美洲大陆最東处。在2010年，此州人口為3,766,528人。 教育 葡萄牙語是官方語言，但英語和西班牙語也是部分中學課程…

locations.name: 南里奥格兰德州
locations.summary: 南里奥格兰德州（葡萄牙語：Rio Grande do Sul，直译：「南方的大河」，發音：[ˈʁiw ˈɡɾɐ̃dʒi du ˈsuw] ），或称南大河州，是巴西最南端的一个州，东临大西洋，首府阿雷格里港，人口10,963,216。该州与…

locations.name: 南马托格罗索州
locations.summary: 南马托格罗索州（葡萄牙語：Mato Grosso do Sul）是巴西西部的一个州，首府大坎普，人口2,297,981人。该州与玻利维亚和巴拉圭接壤。 参见 南馬托格羅索州市鎮列表

locations.name: 米西奧內斯省 (阿根廷)
locations.summary: 米西奥内斯省為南美國家阿根廷二十三省之一，位於阿根廷東北部美索不達米亞地區。西北與巴拉圭接壤，北部和東部與巴西接壤，省会波萨达斯。 地理 米西奧內斯是阿根廷第二小的省，僅次於圖庫曼省。

relations.subject: Social flycatcher
relations.evidence: | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Myiozetetes | species = similis | authority = (Spix, 1825) | synonyms = Muscicapa similis (protonym) | range_map = Myiozetetes similis map.svg }} The social flycatcher (Myiozetetes similis) is a passerine bird from the Americas, a member of the large tyrant flycatcher family Tyrannidae. It is found in Mexico, every Central American country, and every mainland South American country except Chile, Guyana, Suriname, and Uruguay.Remsen, J

relations.subject: Social flycatcher
relations.evidence: | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Myiozetetes | species = similis | authority = (Spix, 1825) | synonyms = Muscicapa similis (protonym) | range_map = Myiozetetes similis map.svg }} The social flycatcher (Myiozetetes similis) is a passerine bird from the Americas, a member of the large tyrant flycatcher family Tyrannidae. It is found in Mexico, every Central American country, and every mainland South American country except Chile, Guyana, Suriname, and Uruguay.Remsen, J

relations.subject: Social flycatcher
relations.evidence: pallidiventris: eastern Brazil roughly bounded by eastern Pará, Paraíba, northern Rio Grande do Sul, and Mato Grosso do Sul continuing into eastern Paraguay and northeastern Argentina's Misiones Province The species has also occurred as a vagrant in the United States with at least one record in Texas. The social flycatcher inhabits a variety of moist to semi-arid landscapes in the tropical and lower subtropical zones, most of which are somewhat open
